yinYang.formerIssue: Invert Arc reversed the positive-sweep point order, mirroring the inner S curve while retaining the same topology and outer bounds.
yinYang.resolution: Invert Arc now keeps the start point and negates the sweep, matching Blender's opposite-side arc contract.

remaining: The maximum residual is on the arced display-title curve frame; it is sub-0.00008 and does not alter topology or the visible composition.
